This directory contains template files for creating new Copilot Agents.

### Usage
1. Copy a template file (e.g., task-template.agent.md)
2. Rename to match your agent's purpose (use kebab-case)
3. Customize the content for your specific agent
4. Place the new agent in the parent directory (.github/agents/)

### Template Structure
Templates include:
- Agent purpose and scope
- Core instructions
- Input/output examples
- Best practices and constraints

### Naming Convention
- Use descriptive names: feature-name.agent.md
- Avoid abbreviations unless widely understood
- Keep names concise but clear
